name: dill chicken roast
instructions: rub: 1/2 tbsp each kosher salt, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, black pepper. add dried tarragon and dill to taste. mix well, apply to the whole chicken exterior with olive oil. stuff cavity with fresh dill, leeks, and lemon slices. bake at 400 for 20 min to crisp the skin, then drop to 350 until internal temp hits 155-165.
